query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "tide: proactive multi-problem discovery via template-guided iteration" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (d) as it investigates the same core mechanism (template-guided iteration for automated program repair) and explicitly builds upon the foundational methodology of the user's referenced work (TIDE/TBar), making it a canonical prior work for a literature review on extending template-based APR.
